takeyourstreamchat.config.title: Stream Chat Settings
takeyourstreamchat.config.hint_default: Hover a setting to see its description
takeyourstreamchat.config.chance_for_spa: Chance for a message to spawn
takeyourstreamchat.config.message_histor: Maximum number of messages kept in history
takeyourstreamchat.config.message_lifeti: How long messages stay visible (in seconds)
takeyourstreamchat.config.message_fall_s: How long messages take to fall (in seconds)
takeyourstreamchat.config.role_filter.de: Show messages only from selected roles across all platforms (Twitch badges, YouTube members, Kick/TikTok badges). Regular viewers are shown when set to All.
takeyourstreamchat.config.username_block: Enable blocking messages from specific usernames
takeyourstreamchat.blocked_users.title: Manage Blocked Usernames
takeyourstreamchat.banwords.title: Manage Banwords
takeyourstreamchat.regexps.title: Manage Banwords
takeyourstreamchat.config.youtube_enable: Include YouTube live chat when connecting
takeyourstreamchat.config.youtube_channe: YouTube @handle, video URL, or 11-char video ID while live. Use ON/OFF on the right to include this platform.
takeyourstreamchat.config.kick_channel.d: Kick channel slug from kick.com/username. Use ON/OFF on the right to include this platform.
takeyourstreamchat.config.tiktok_enabled: Include TikTok live chat when connecting
takeyourstreamchat.config.tiktok_usernam: TikTok @username while live. Use ON/OFF on the right to include this platform.
takeyourstreamchat.config.chat_connectio: Connect or disconnect all enabled platforms (same as the hotkey)
takeyourstreamchat.chat.no_platforms: No platforms enabled. Turn on at least one platform in settings.
takeyourstreamchat.chat.not_connected: Not connected to any chat platform.
takeyourstreamchat.chat.error.no_live_ro: %s: no live stream found for '%s' (wrong name or stream is offline)
takeyourstreamchat.chat.error.blocked: %s: request was blocked by the platform, retrying...
takeyourstreamchat.config.channel_name.d: Twitch channel name. Use ON/OFF on the right to include this platform when connecting.
takeyourstreamchat.config.automoderation: Enable automatic filtering of banned words
Play a notification sound when a new chat message appears
takeyourstreamchat.config.message_sound_: Volume of the new message notification sound
takeyourstreamchat.config.auto_connect_i: Automatically connect to enabled chat platforms when entering a world/server
takeyourstreamchat.config.message_lifeti: How long messages stay visible (in ticks)
takeyourstreamchat.config.message_fall.d: How long messages take to fall (in ticks)
takeyourstreamchat.config.spawn_mode.des: Where messages appear in the world
takeyourstreamchat.config.spawn_min_dist: Minimum horizontal distance from player for Around and FOP spawn (blocks)
takeyourstreamchat.config.spawn_max_dist: Maximum horizontal distance from player for Around and FOP spawn (blocks)
takeyourstreamchat.config.freezing_on_vi: Freeze messages when looking at them
takeyourstreamchat.config.max_freeze_dis: Maximum distance for message freezing (in blocks)
takeyourstreamchat.config.show_message_b: Show semi-transparent background behind message text
takeyourstreamchat.config.color_emojis.d: Render Unicode emojis with the system emoji font instead of the Minecraft font
3D messages smoothly follow the player, keeping their original relative offset
takeyourstreamchat.config.click_to_remov: Left-click on messages to remove them instantly with particles
takeyourstreamchat.config.unpin_mode.des: How to unpin a pinned 3D message with right-click. Whole message: quick click unpins, holding drags
takeyourstreamchat.history.title: Chat History
takeyourstreamchat.history.pinned_empty: No pinned messages. Pin a message in the world or from history to see it here.
takeyourstreamchat.history.empty: No messages yet. Connect to Twitch chat to see messages here.
takeyourstreamchat.history.scroll_hint: Scroll · Click a message for actions
takeyourstreamchat.history.click_for_act: Click for pin, block, or replay
